data.name: Msg_InvalidRecoveryConfig
data.value: Recovery actions and restart attempts cannot be configured unless --enableHealth is set to true.

data.name: Msg_ValidationError
data.value: Please fill in all required fields.

data.name: Msg_ServiceNameContainsTrailingWhitespace
data.value: Service name cannot have leading or trailing whitespace.

data.name: Msg_ServiceNameTooLong
data.value: The service name is too long. It must be 256 characters or fewer.

data.name: Msg_InvalidServiceName
data.value: Service name contains invalid characters. Avoid using '\', '/', ':', '*', '?', '"', '<', '>', '|'.

data.name: Msg_ValidationPassed
data.value: Validation passed for service '{0}'.

data.name: Msg_InvalidWrapperExePath
data.value: Service wrapper executable not found.

data.name: Msg_InvalidStartupDirectory
data.value: The specified startup directory is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidStartupType
data.value: The specified startup type is invalid. Options: Automatic, AutomaticDelayedStart, Manual, Disabled.

data.name: Msg_InvalidProcessPriority
data.value: The specified process priority is invalid. Options: Idle, BelowNormal, Normal, AboveNormal, High, RealTime.

data.name: Msg_InvalidStdoutPath
data.value: The specified stdout file path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidStderrPath
data.value: The specified stderr file path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidRotationSize
data.value: Rotation size must be a number of Megabytes (MB) between {0} and {1}.

data.name: Msg_InvalidDateRotationType
data.value: The specified date rotation type is invalid. Options: Daily, Weekly, Monthly.

data.name: Msg_InvalidMaxRotations
data.value: Max rotations must be a number between {0} and {1}. Set to 0 for unlimited rotations.

data.name: Msg_InvalidHeartbeatInterval
data.value: Heartbeat interval must be a number of seconds between {0} and {1}.

data.name: Msg_InvalidMaxFailedChecks
data.value: Max Failed Checks must be a number between {0} and {1}.

data.name: Msg_InvalidRecoveryAction
data.value: The specified recovery action is invalid. Options: None, RestartService, RestartProcess, RestartComputer.

data.name: Msg_InvalidMaxRestartAttempts
data.value: Max Restart Attempts must be a number between {0} and {1}. Set to 0 for unlimited restart attempts.

data.name: Msg_ServiceInstalled
data.value: Service was installed successfully.

data.name: Msg_ServiceRemoved
data.value: Service was removed successfully.

data.name: Msg_UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.

data.name: Msg_AdminRightsRequired
data.value: Administrator privileges are required.

data.name: Msg_ServiceStarted
data.value: Service was started successfully.

data.name: Msg_ServiceStopped
data.value: Service was stopped successfully.

data.name: Msg_ServiceRestarted
data.value: Service was restarted successfully.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPreLaunchPath
data.value: The pre-launch process path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPreLaunchStartupDirectory
data.value: The specified pre-launch startup directory is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPreLaunchStdoutPath
data.value: The specified pre-launch stdout file path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPreLaunchStderrPath
data.value: The specified pre-launch stderr file path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPreLaunchTimeout
data.value: Pre-Launch timeout must be a number of seconds between {0} and {1}. Set the timeout to 0 to run the pre-launch hook in fire-and-forget mode. When set to 0, the hook is started and the service is launched immediately without waiting for completion. Use fire-and-forget only for tasks that do not affect the service's ability to start or run correctly. Stdout/Stderr redirection and retries are not available in fire-and-forget mode.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPreLaunchRetryAttempts
data.value: Pre-Launch retry attempts must be a number between {0} and {1}.

data.name: Msg_InvalidFailureProgramPath
data.value: The failure program path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidFailureProgramStartupDirectory
data.value: The specified failure program startup directory is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPostLaunchPath
data.value: The post-launch process path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPostLaunchStartupDirectory
data.value: The specified post-launch startup directory is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidStartTimeout
data.value: Start timeout must be a number between {0} and {1} seconds.

data.name: Msg_InvalidStopTimeout
data.value: Stop timeout must be a number between {0} and {1} seconds.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPreStopPath
data.value: The pre-stop process path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPreStopStartupDirectory
data.value: The specified pre-stop startup directory is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPreStopTimeout
data.value: Pre-Stop timeout must be a number of seconds between {0} and {1}. Set the timeout to 0 to run the pre-stop process in fire-and-forget mode.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPostStopPath
data.value: The post-stop process path is invalid.

data.name: Msg_InvalidPostStopStartupDirectory
data.value: The specified post-stop startup directory is invalid.

data.name: Msg_ServiceNameLengthReached
data.value: Service name exceeds {0} characters.

data.name: Msg_DisplayNameLengthReached
data.value: Display name exceeds {0} characters.

data.name: Msg_DescriptionLengthReached
data.value: Description exceeds {0} characters.

data.name: Msg_ArgumentsLengthReachedForField
data.value: Arguments for field '{0}' exceed the Windows command-line limit of {1} characters.

data.name: Msg_PasswordsDontMatch
data.value: Passwords don't match.

data.name: Msg_FatalError_Title
data.value: Servy - Fatal Error

data.name: Msg_FatalError_Body
data.value: A fatal error occurred and the application must close. Detailed diagnostics have been saved to the log file.

data.name: Msg_UnexpectedError_Title
data.value: Servy - Unexpected Error

data.name: Msg_UnexpectedError_Body
data.value: An unexpected error occurred in the interface, but the application will attempt to continue. Details have been logged.

data.name: Msg_StartupError_Format
data.value: Startup error: {0}

data.name: Msg_ImportFileNotFound
data.value: [Import] File not found: {0}

data.name: Msg_InvalidServiceDependencyName
data.value: Invalid service name '{0}'. Only letters, digits, hyphens, underscores, and periods are allowed.

data.name: Msg_EnvironmentVariableMissingEquals
data.value: Each environment variable must contain an unescaped '=' character to separate the key from the value.

data.name: Msg_EnvironmentVariableKeyEmpty
data.value: Environment variable key cannot be empty.

data.name: FileFilter_Executable
data.value: Executable files (*.exe)|*.exe|All files (*.*)|*.*

data.name: FileFilter_Xml
data.value: XML files (*.xml)|*.xml

data.name: FileFilter_Json
data.value: JSON files (*.json)|*.json

data.name: FileFilter_AllFiles
data.value: All files (*.*)|*.*

data.name: Title_SelectExecutable
data.value: Select process executable

data.name: Title_SelectXml
data.value: Select XML file

data.name: Title_SelectJson
data.value: Select JSON file

data.name: Title_SelectStartupDirectory
data.value: Select startup directory

data.name: Msg_SecurityUncPathProhibited
data.value: Security Alert: Importing from UNC paths is prohibited to prevent malicious configuration injection.

data.name: Msg_SecurityNetworkDriveProhibited
data.value: Security Alert: Importing from network drives (including mapped UNC shares) is prohibited.

data.name: Msg_SecurityDirReparsePointProhibited
data.value: Security Alert: Importing configurations through directory junctions or symlinks is prohibited to prevent path redirection attacks.

data.name: Msg_SecurityFileReparsePointProhibited
data.value: Security Alert: Importing configurations through file symbolic links or junctions is prohibited to prevent path redirection attacks.

data.name: Msg_SecurityReservedDeviceName
data.value: Security Alert: '{0}' is a reserved Windows device name and cannot be used.

data.name: Msg_SecurityProtectedDirectory
data.value: Access Denied: The resolved path targets protected system directory '{0}'. Import prohibited.

data.name: Msg_SecurityInvalidFileType
data.value: Security Alert: Invalid file type '{0}'. Only .json and .xml files are supported.

data.name: Msg_SecurityResolvedUncDestination
data.value: Security Alert: Resolved file target points directly to a UNC destination. Import aborted.

data.name: Msg_SecurityHandleValidationFailed
data.value: Security Guard Failure: Target file handle validation rejected. {0}

data.name: Msg_InvalidPath
data.value: The specified path is invalid.
